import { useNavigate } from "react-router-dom"; import { useState } from "react"; import "./Dashboard.css"; function Dashboard() { const navigate = useNavigate(); const [searchTerm, setSearchTerm] = useState(""); const books = [ { id: 1, title: "Belajar React.js Dari Nol", author: "John Smith", price: "Rp 150.000", image: "https://via.placeholder.com/200x280?text=React", category: "Teknologi" }, { id: 2, title: "Panduan Web Development Lengkap", author: "Jane Doe", price: "Rp 200.000", image: "https://via.placeholder.com/200x280?text=Web", category: "Teknologi" }, { id: 3, title: "JavaScript: Dasar hingga Advanced", author: "Mike Johnson", price: "Rp 180.000", image: "https://via.placeholder.com/200x280?text=JavaScript", category: "Pemrograman" }, { id: 4, title: "CSS dan UI Design Praktis", author: "Sarah Williams", price: "Rp 160.000", image: "https://via.placeholder.com/200x280?text=CSS", category: "Design" }, { id: 5, title: "Menguasai Database MySQL", author: "David Brown", price: "Rp 220.000", image: "https://via.placeholder.com/200x280?text=Database", category: "Database" }, { id: 6, title: "Aplikasi Mobile dengan React Native", author: "Emma Davis", price: "Rp 210.000", image: "https://via.placeholder.com/200x280?text=Mobile", category: "Mobile" }, { id: 7, title: "Node.js dan Express API REST", author: "Alex Cooper", price: "Rp 190.000", image: "https://via.placeholder.com/200x280?text=Node", category: "Backend" } ]; // Filter buku berdasarkan search const filteredBooks = books.filter((book) => book.title.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm.toLowerCase()) || book.author.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm.toLowerCase()) || book.category.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm.toLowerCase()) ); const handleLogout = () => { navigate("/"); }; return (

); } export default Dashboard;
